title: GSR 980(E) Regarding Extension of Shri Justice Prakash Srivastava as Commissioner
description: GSR 980(E) Regarding Extension of Shri Justice Prakash Srivastava as Commissioner

L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (i) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 721] ubZ fnYyh] lkseokj] vDrwcj 17] 2016@vkf'ou 25, 1938 No. 721] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, OCTOBER 17, 2016/ASVINA 25, 1938 रसायन एवं उवᭅ रक मंᮢ ालय (रसायन एवं पे ᮝोरसायन िवभाग) अिधसू चना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 17 अ᭍टूबर, 2016 सा.का.िन. 980(अ).—भोपाल गैस ᳯरसाव ᮢ ासदी (दावᲂ का िन᭭तारण) अिधिनयम, 198 5 (1985 का 21) कᳱ धारा 6 कᳱ उप-धारा (1) ᳇ारा ᮧदᱫ शिᲦयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए, कᱶᮤ सरकार, एतद् ᳇ारा, म᭟य ᮧदेश उ᭒च ᭠यायालय के पीठासीन ᭠यायाधीश ᮰ी ᭠यायमूᳶत ᮧकाश ᮰ीवा᭭तव को भोपाल गैस ᳯरसाव ᮢ ासदी पीिड़तᲂ के क᭨याण के िलए आयुᲦ के पद के समवतᱮ ᮧभार कᳱ अविध को 01.08.2016 से एक वषᭅ कᳱ अविध तक के िलए या अगले आदेशᲂ तक, जो भी पहले हो, बढ़ाती है । [फा. सं. 21/21/2002 - भोपाल सेल] समीर कुमार िब᭫वास, संयु᭍त सिचव MINISTRY OF CHEMICALS AND FERTILIZERS (Department of Chemicals and Petrochemicals) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 17th October, 2016 G.S.R. 980(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 6 of Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster (Processing of Claims) Act, 1985 (21 of 1985), the Central Government hereby extends the tenure of Shri Justice Prakash Shrivastava, a sitting Judge of the High Court of Madhya Pradesh to hold concurrent charge of the post of Commissioner for the Welfare of the Victims of Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster, for a period of one year with effect from 01.08.2016 or until further orders, whichever is earlier. [F. No. 21/21/2002-B.Cell] SAMIR KUMAR BISWAS, Jt.
